title: gladiolus × fragrans
intro: Gladiolus × fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Gladiolus, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family, characterized by its tall stems and colorful, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in treating wounds, reducing swelling, and alleviating pain. The health benefits of Gladiolus × fragrans include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
